claim_under_attack: The cost asymmetry between investigation (2-4 weeks, light staffing) and premature build (4-12 weeks, full team) strongly favors the investigate-first path when evidence is weak.
evidence_or_reason: This claim asserts a strong cost comparison without any visible supporting basis in the artifact. No feature scope, team composition, architecture complexity, or historical delivery data is provided, so the 2-4 week investigation estimate and 4-12 week build estimate appear invented rather than derived. Without grounded sizing inputs, the supposed asymmetry is too speculative to support a decision.
